[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01101110 5
1 10111110 6
2 11101101 6
3 00101100 3
4 01000110 3
5 01100001 3
6 01110101 5
7 01101110 5
